# DODGE THE BLOCK - CO PROJECT
.data
    GPAddress:  .word 0x10008000    
    bg:         .word 0x00FFA500    # orange
    charColor:  .word 0x00FFC0CB    #pink
    blockColor: .word 0x00FF0000    # red block
    green:      .word 0x0000FF00    # green win screen
    
    characterX: .word 30            # player
    blockX:      .word 30           # x of b
    blockY:      .word 0            # y of b
    
    score:       .word 0            
    level:       .word 1            #counter
    sleep_time:  .word 60           
    start_time:  .word 0           
    
    win_msg:     .asciiz "CONGRATULATIONS! you won!"
    lose_msg:    .asciiz "GAME OVER! You were hit."
    stats_msg:   .asciiz "Survival Time: "
    seconds_msg: .asciiz " seconds"

0x00000000

.text
.globl main
main:
    lw $s0, GPAddress               

    li $v0, 30                     
    syscall                      
    sw $a0, start_time              

 #sound
    li $v0, 31                      
    li $a0, 60                      
    li $a1, 500                     # set duration to 500ms
    li $a2, 1                       # piano
    li $a3, 127                     # volume to max 
    syscall                         # play start sound

gameloop:
    jal clear_screen              
    
    # kb input
    lui $t0, 0xffff                 
    lw $t1, 0($t0)                  
    andi $t1, $t1, 1                
    beq $t1, $zero, physics       
    lw $t2, 4($t0)                  
    beq $t2, 0x61, move_a           # If key is 'a' jump to move_a 
    beq $t2, 0x64, move_d           # If key is 'd', jump to move_d 

move_a:
    lw $t0, characterX              # load x
    ble $t0, 2, physics      # don't move left if at edge
    addi $t0, $t0, -4               
    sw $t0, characterX              # save
    j physics                # continue to physics

move_d:
    lw $t0, characterX              #load x pos
    bge $t0, 58,physics     # don't move right if at edge
    addi $t0, $t0, 4                
    sw $t0, characterX              # Save new X position

physics:
    lw $t0, blockY                  # load y of block
    addi $t0, $t0, 4              
    sw $t0, blockY                  # store y pos
    
    li $t2, 64                      #height limit
    blt $t0, $t2, col_check         # if block is still on screen go to collision check
    
    # block reset
    sw $zero, blockY                # block reached bottom ,reset
    li $v0, 42                      # gen random int
    li $a1, 58                     
    syscall                         
    sw $a0, blockX                  # set block to new pos
    
    # play sound
    li $v0, 31                      
    li $a0, 84                     
    li $a1, 150                     
    li $a2, 10                      
    li $a3, 100                     
    syscall                         
    
    lw $t3, score                   # load dodge counter
    addi $t3, $t3, 1                # increment score
    sw $t3, score                  

    # higher level   
    lw $t7, sleep_time              # load frane delay
    ble $t7, 10, skip_level_up      # if reached 10 ms stop
    addi $t7, $t7, -6             # decrease sleep time by 6ms,make game faster
    sw $t7, sleep_time              # store new speed
    
skip_level_up:
    li $t8, 10                     # 10 dodges to win
    beq $t3, $t8, game_win          # if score reaches 10, you win

col_check:
    lw $t0, characterX              
    lw $t1, blockX                 
    sub $t2, $t0, $t1               
    abs $t2, $t2                    # get max distance
    bge $t2, 4, draw_all            # If distance >= 4 , no horizontal hit
    
    lw $t0, blockY                 
    li $t1, 58                     
    sub $t2, $t0, $t1              
    abs $t2, $t2                    
    bge $t2, 6, draw_all            # If distance >= 6, no vertical hit
    j game_lose                     # x and y both hit: game over 

draw_all:
    # draw player
    lw $a0, characterX            
    li $a1, 58                      
    lw $a2, charColor               
    jal draw_4x4                    
    
    # draw block
    lw $a0, blockX                 
    lw $a1, blockY                  
    lw $a2, blockColor              
    jal draw_4x4                    
    
    li $v0, 32                      # 32,sleep
    lw $a0, sleep_time             
    syscall                         
    j gameloop                      

# draw square
draw_4x4:
    addi $sp, $sp, -16             
    sw $ra, 12($sp)               
    sw $s1, 8($sp)                 
    sw $s2, 4($sp)
    sw $t7, 0($sp)
    move $s1, $a0                  
    move $s2, $a1                   
    li $t7, 0                       # row counter
row_l:
    li $t4, 0                       # column counter  
col_l:
    add $a0, $s1, $t4               # x = base x + column 
    add $a1, $s2, $t7               # y = base y + row 
    jal drawpixel                  
    addi $t4, $t4, 1                # increment column
    blt $t4, 4, col_l               # loop until 4 pixels 
    addi $t7, $t7, 1                # increment row
    blt $t7, 4, row_l               # loop until 4 pixels
    lw $t7, 0($sp)                  # restore 
    lw $s2, 4($sp)
    lw $s1, 8($sp)
    lw $ra, 12($sp)
    addi $sp, $sp, 16              
    jr $ra                     

# color pixels
drawpixel:
    mul $t9, $a1, 64                # offset = y * 64
    add $t9, $t9, $a0               # offset = offset + x
    sll $t9, $t9, 2                 # offset = offset * 4 
    add $t9, $t9, $s0               # add offset to bitmap base address
    sw $a2, 0($t9)               
    jr $ra                          

#clear screen
clear_screen:
    li $t0, 0                       
    lw $t1, bg                      
c_loop:
    sll $t2, $t0, 2                 # pixel * 4
    add $t3, $s0, $t2               # add base address
    sw $t1, 0($t3)                  # pixel to orange
    addi $t0, $t0, 1               
    li $t4, 4096                    # total pixels = 64 * 64
    blt $t0, $t4, c_loop            # loop until full screen is wiped
    jr $ra                       

#draw game over
dgo_screen:
    lw $t0, GPAddress              
    la $t1, game_over               
    li $t2, 0                      
dgo_loop:
    lw $t3, 0($t1)                
    sw $t3, 0($t0)                
    addi $t0, $t0, 4               
    addi $t1, $t1, 4            
    addi $t2, $t2, 1                
    li $t4, 4096                   
    blt $t2, $t4, dgo_loop          
    jr $ra                         

#player wins
win_screen:
    lw $t0, GPAddress              
    lw $t1, green                  
    li $t2, 0                       
win_loop:
    sw $t1, 0($t0)                  
    addi $t0, $t0, 4                
    addi $t2, $t2, 1                
    li $t4, 4096                    # 64 * 64 pixels
    blt $t2, $t4, win_loop
    jr $ra

# win game
game_win:
    li $v0, 33                      
    li $a0, 72                     
    li $a1, 1500                    # duration 1.5s
    li $a2, 56                      
    li $a3, 127                     
    syscall

    jal win_screen                  

    li $v0, 4                      
    la $a0, win_msg
    syscall
    jal print_stats               
    li $v0, 10                     
    syscall

#lose
game_lose:
    li $v0, 33                      
    li $a0, 30                      
    li $a1, 1000                    #1s
    li $a2, 114                    
    li $a3, 127
    syscall
    jal dgo_screen      
    li $v0, 4                      
    la $a0, lose_msg
    syscall
    jal print_stats                 
    li $v0, 10                      
    syscall

# print score
print_stats:
    li $v0, 30                      
    syscall
    lw $t1, start_time              
    sub $t0, $a0, $t1               
    li $t2, 1000                    
    div $t0, $t2                    
    mflo $t5                        #  total s survived
    
    li $v0, 4                       
    la $a0, stats_msg
    syscall
    
    move $a0, $t5                   
    li $v0, 1                      
    syscall
    
    li $v0, 4                       
    la $a0, seconds_msg
    syscall
    jr $ra
